activation_mode.mechanism: Factory Droid rule files load unconditionally; no conditional or model-decision activation documented

auto_memory.mechanism: Factory Droid does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: agents_md_format: Factory Droid reads AGENTS.md files in the shared multi-provider format

file_imports.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Factory Droid rule files

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Factory Droid loads global and project rule layers; innermost (most specific) layer takes precedence

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md Format
providerExtensions.summary: Factory uses the cross-provider AGENTS.md standard (OpenAI/Codex origin), with innermost file precedence across directory levels.

providerExtensions.name: Global Rules Path
providerExtensions.summary: A global ~/AGENTS.md applies across all projects, overridden by any project-level or subdirectory AGENTS.md.

providerExtensions.name: Custom Instructions Setting
providerExtensions.summary: Personal settings file customInstructions key provides always-on guidance regardless of which project is open.
